daily.today_energy: mercury's doing its thing and you're feeling that clarity energy. trust your instincts today—they're basically your personal gps right now. perfect time to organize something that's been living in your head rent-free.
daily.love: if you're coupled up, vulnerability is your love language today. if you're single, someone's noticing the quiet confidence you're radiating. either way, let people see the real you without overthinking it.
daily.career: your attention to detail is basically a superpower rn. that project or task everyone's sleeping on? you could totally elevate it. don't wait for permission to make things better—your instincts are spot-on.
daily.health: your body's asking for movement that feels good, not punishment. whether that's a walk, yoga, or just dancing in your room—honor what actually feels nourishing. mental health check-in: you're doing better than you think.

weekly.overview: This week's cosmic energy is inviting you to slow down and actually listen to what your intuition's been trying to tell you. Mercury's moving favorably, so clarity is coming—trust the whispers.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, this is peak energy for authentic connections. Stop performing and let people see the real you. The right ones will stay, and that's the whole point.
weekly.career: Your work momentum is building quietly. Small wins matter more than you think right now. Stay focused on what you can control and watch how opportunities align when you're not forcing things.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for presence over perfection. Move in ways that feel good, nourish yourself without guilt, and create space for rest. Energy follows intention—set yours toward feeling genuinely better.
